posts.text:
Encourage someone.
Celebrate someone.
Lift someone up.

In a world where so many are weighed down by life’s relentless struggles, even the smallest act of encouragement can remind someone that there is still goodness in this world and that they have the power to rise.

Video

Important words to remember amidst Donald Trump’s costly, chaotic unilateral decision to bring our country into war.

From Jimmy Carter’s Nobel Prize acceptance speech.

Video

The FCC Chair who spent years fashioning himself as a crusader for free speech is now openly threatening to revoke broadcasters' licenses over their coverage of the war with Iran.

This is state-sponsored censorship. Pure and simple. And straight out of the dictators' playbook.
nytimes.com/2026/03/14/world…

Kristi Noem is gone, but ICE is still acting recklessly and dangerously in our communities.

Video

ICE continues to bring chaos into communities across America.

But we will not be silenced.

Protest. Activism. Questioning authority. These are not crimes, they are the lifeblood of a healthy democracy and a necessary check on agencies that abuse their power.

Republicans in Congress refuse to provide any kind of meaningful oversight or check and balances or hold ICE accountable for their lawlessness. 

I will not vote for another dollar to fund an agency that is out of control and endangering

We need to stand up and fight back against an out-of-control executive. The Senate needs to start doing its job.

Video

Everyone has a story, choose kindness every day.

op: @jayshetty

Video

Jimmy Kimmel lays it plain.

Video

More broken promises from JD Vance and Donald Trump.

Video

An important read from the New York Times. The death penalty is a moral obscenity and a stain on our justice system.
nytimes.com/2026/03/13/opini…

Trump does not have to pay the price for his chaos, working Americans do.

Video

Here’s to kindness.
To the people who stop when others walk past.
Who see humanity where others see inconvenience.
Who stand up for those who others punch down on. 

Never underestimate the power of a kind deed, word, or spirit.

Video

Instead of lowering costs for Americans, Trump is spending billions on yet another war in the Middle East.

Video

I’m deeply disturbed by yesterday’s attack on a synagogue and school in Michigan.

These are sacred spaces where communities come together.

We must continue to combat antisemitism and hate-inspired violence.

The Trump Administration is letting the meat processing industry exploit its workers—and is making the food you eat less safe.

Video

Americans are dying in the war in Iran, and Trump can’t even put together a coherent answer as to why we are in this conflict.

Video

The Keep Your Pay Act lets you save more of the money you earn.

Video

Trump's chaotic and cruel immigration lawlessness must stop.

Video
6 years after mismanaging the worst pandemic in the United States in a century, Trump and now RFK Jr. are overseeing resurgences of diseases we once eliminated.

Americans want lower prices, not unconstitutional wars, rising gas prices, and chaos in the markets.

Video
